seed_instruction: Write an email to a bus company to inquire about travel schedules.
new_constraint: The email must include the word "timetable" at least twice.
instruction: Write an email to a bus company to inquire about travel schedules. Avoid using the word "timetable." The email must include the word "timetable" at least twice.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Bus Service Schedules

Dear [Bus Company Name] Customer Service,

I am writing to inquire about your bus service schedules for travel between [Starting City] and [Destination City].

I am planning a trip and would like to understand what departure and arrival times are available for this route. Could you please provide me with your current service schedule? I am particularly interested in knowing the various times throughout the day that trips are offered.

If there is an online document or a separate page on your website that displays the full travel schedule, I would appreciate a link to it. I am trying to compare different options and need to examine the complete timetable.

Also, if you have a general timetable that shows all routes, please share that as well. Thank you very much for your assistance with this request.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number or Email Address]<turn|>
